bec005_only_confirmation.reason_current_runner_not_confirmed: Current execute path loads all 16 draft packets from DRAFT_GLOB and sends all packets to all configured models. No family or packet filter is exposed by the CLI.

old_900_token_failure_risk.residual_risk: Residual malformed-output risk remains if a provider ignores compact JSON instructions, but the old Anthropic 900-token cap/rationale-length mismatch is directly mitigated by compact prompt constraints and a 1200-token Anthropic cap.

prompt_config_patch_recommended_before_r.summary: Prompt/budget patch is already applied. A minimal runner patch is still required for a valid BEC-PAIR-005-only diagnostic rescout command.

proposed_command_validity: Valid only after a minimal runner patch adds --family-id and --out-dir support. Current committed runner would reject these flags and its existing execute path would run all 16 packets.
scope: Plan-only preparation for a future BEC-PAIR-005 diagnostic rescout. No live calls were made.
stop_rules: Stop before running if branch is not holo-builder-freeze-manifest-gate-001.
Stop before running if git status --short is not clean.
Stop before running if active mandate no longer allows this preparation path.
Stop before running unless Taylor explicitly approves the diagnostic rescout.
Stop before running if the runner still lacks confirmed BEC-PAIR-005-only filtering.
Stop before running unless selected packet IDs are exactly BAL100-BEC-PAIR-005-ALLOW and BAL100-BEC-PAIR-005-CALLBACK-PROVENANCE-FAIL.
Stop before running if provider roster differs from the five configured mini providers unless Taylor explicitly scopes a provider subset.
Stop before running if required provider API keys are missing in Taylor-local environment.
Stop before running if output directory already exists and would overwrite prior artifacts.
Stop after running if any result is a provider operational failure or parser failure.
Stop if any command attempts to create traces, Judge artifacts, QA/ablation artifacts, packet edits, frozen artifact edits, or proof-credit changes.
